definitions: 黑猩猩（一种非洲大型类人猿，chimpanzee）

examples.text: This chimpanzee stumbles across a windfall of overripe plums. Many of them have split open, drawing him to their intoxicating fruity odor.
examples.explanation: 句子意思是：这只黑猩猩偶然发现了一堆熟透掉落的李子，其中许多已经裂开，散发出令人着迷的果香。chimpanzee 在这里指“黑猩猩”。

source.text: A brief history of alcohol - Rod Phillips
